steps.title: Cube the unit conversion
steps.content:
The conversion is linear, but volume is three-dimensional. Since $1$ inch is $2.54$ centimeters, $1$ cubic inch is
$$(2.54)^3$$
cubic centimeters.

steps.title: Convert the volume
steps.content:
Multiply the given volume in cubic inches by the cubic conversion factor.
$$563.84(2.54)^3$$

steps.title: Round the result
steps.content: Evaluating the expression gives $9{,}239.68$ cubic centimeters, which rounds to the nearest whole number. The answer is 9240.
